description.ko: 빛의 물리학에 초점을 맞추어 백색광이 유리를 통해 기본 스펙트럼 구성 요소로 분해되는 순간을 포착합니다.
description.en: A focus on the physics of light, capturing the moment white light breaks into its base spectral components through glass.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro photography shot of PRISM-2, titled 'The Spectrum of the Infinite.' A multi-faceted crystalline structure captures a single white light beam, shattering it into an ultra-wide spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. The background is a minimalist matte black, making the rainbow caustics glow with pure energy. 8k resolution, ray-traced refraction, emphasizing internal light paths, glass clarity, and the pure physics of light dispersion.
